notice: GENERATED CODE - DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND.

feature.name: Member Chat
feature.description: Orchestrates a consumer conversation thread across message delivery, media upload, profile and sharing actions, safety controls, event context, and Suvbot variants.

actionScope.included: Member message, image, profile, share-card, report, block, and Suvbot actions.
excluded: Automatic read-receipt resets, scroll coordination, retry scheduling, and event-context loading retain controller-owned lifecycle behavior.

actions.description: Creates one text message in the current conversation.
Uploads an image and creates the corresponding chat message, compensating storage when the write fails.
Opens the other member's public profile when the thread view model exposes a valid target.
Builds and opens a share card from the current non-empty message snapshot.
Submits a chat-context safety report for the other member.
Blocks the other member once for the active viewer-target relationship and closes the conversation.
Runs one action from the server-provided Suvbot action set.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These mutation states have focused tests and Widgetbook coverage but no deterministic capture registered by the screen authority.
These registered route variants have captures and previews but no focused state-level test attached to the authority.
